message:
feat(codegen): Add value type inference for dict comprehensions

Uses TypeInferrer to properly infer dict comprehension value types:
- Set up temp vars for loop variables before inferring value type
- Handle range() iterators (gives i64)
- Handle list/listcomp iterators (infer element type)
- Handle other iterators by inferring and extracting element type
- Added nativeTypeToZigStr helper for type string conversion

This fixes type mismatches where dict comprehensions like {k: g for k in range(10)}
would generate HashMap(i64, i64) instead of HashMap(i64, []const u8) when g is a string.
